case_title: SOQUEL CREEK WATER DISTRICT VS. THE DOW CHEMICAL COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED SEP-20-2016, SERVED SEP-14-2016 (TRANSACTION ID # 59661273) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOQUEL CREEK WATER DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT J.R. SIMPLOT COMPANY
